title: Lumora "Dewdrop" lip-oil color-variant set: cut out on white, recolor one hero shot into 8 shade variants + spec sheet
one_line_ask: Clean up and cut out one raw phone shot of the Dewdrop lip-oil bottle onto a white e-commerce background, then recolor the translucent oil into 8 on-brand shade variants while keeping the metallic collar, cap, and lighting/shadow identical across all of them, and emit a variant spec sheet.

issues: Very slight warm tone in dropper bulb deviates marginally from the brief's cool/blue white balance spec, though overall image WB reads cool-neutral and is acceptable
Background clutter is present but slightly more organised/readable than 'distracting' — still within brief tolerance
Frosted glass texture is convincing but internal oil highlights are subtle; light transmission effect is present but understated
